class Order:
    def __init__(self, order_id: int, items: list[dict]):
        self.order_id = order_id
        self.items = items
        self.status = "pending"
        self.total = 0.0


class InventoryManager:
    def __init__(self, stock: dict[str, int]):
        self.stock = stock

    def process_order(self, order: Order) -> None:
        for item in order.items:
            sku = item["sku"]
            qty = item["quantity"]
            self.stock[sku] -= qty
            order.total += item["price"] * qty
        order.status = "confirmed"


class UserAccount:
    def __init__(self, username: str, balance: float):
        self.username = username
        self.balance = balance
        self.friend_balances: dict[str, float] = {}

    def transfer_to_friend(self, friend: "UserAccount", amount: float) -> None:
        self.balance -= amount
        friend.balance += amount
        self.friend_balances[friend.username] = self.friend_balances.get(friend.username, 0) + amount
        friend.friend_balances[self.username] = friend.friend_balances.get(self.username, 0) - amount
